sampled_apps.name: HubSpot
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Inbound marketing, sales, and service software.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Can sign up for a free Developer Account and create test developer portals.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: Broad REST API covering Contacts, Deals, Pipelines, Webhooks, and custom objects.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Official and community MCP servers exist for HubSpot.

sampled_apps.name: DealCloud
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Specialized CRM for financial firms, private equity, and investment banking.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: No self-serve sign up. Credentials are only provided to existing enterprise customers.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: REST API for querying private database models and reporting.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Blocked by strict enterprise gates and private hosting configurations.
sampled_apps.blocker_reason: Requires paid enterprise subscription and admin enablement.

sampled_apps.name: Pylon
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Customer support platform designed for Slack/Teams-first customer operations.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Must book a demo/talk to sales to get access. No public signup/trial.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: REST API for linking Slack conversations to support queues.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Lack of developer sandbox makes sandbox testing impossible.
sampled_apps.blocker_reason: No public trial or free developer sandbox available.

sampled_apps.name: WhatsApp Business
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: API for large businesses to communicate with customers on WhatsApp.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Sign up on Meta for Developers portal, register a test number and get free tokens.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: Graph API REST endpoints for sending templates, media, and text messages.

sampled_apps.name: Shopify
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Leading ecommerce platform for online stores.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Create a free Shopify Partner account to set up developer sandbox stores.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: Very broad APIs. GraphQL is the primary interface for admin and storefront.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Community MCP servers exist for Shopify.

sampled_apps.name: fanbasis
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Monetization and digital marketplace platform for creators.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Private beta. No public documentation or API access.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: No public API surface exists today.
sampled_apps.blocker_reason: No public developer API available; closed platform.

sampled_apps.name: GitHub
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Git repository hosting and developer collaboration platform.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Sign up for free and generate Personal Access Tokens or register GitHub Apps.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: Extremely broad APIs mapping all GitHub features.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Official and community GitHub MCP servers exist.

sampled_apps.name: Notion
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Connected workspace for notes, docs, and databases.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Create a free workspace, then create internal integrations under Developers portal.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: REST API mapping Blocks, Pages, Databases, and Users.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Official and community Notion MCP servers are available.

sampled_apps.name: Plaid
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: API interface linking bank accounts with financial apps.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: Sign up for a free developer account to get instant API keys for sandbox testing.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: REST API for linking items, accounts, balances, transactions, and identity.
sampled_apps.mcp_desc: Broad API but sandbox is open and well-documented.

sampled_apps.name: NotebookLM
sampled_apps.one_line_desc: Personal AI research assistant by Google.
sampled_apps.self_serve_desc: NotebookLM has no direct API. The underlying Gemini API can be used instead.
sampled_apps.api_surface_desc: No public API surface exists for NotebookLM.
sampled_apps.blocker_reason: No direct public API exists for NotebookLM.
